description: Vatan-e Emroz (وطن امروز, 'Today's Homeland') is a hardline daily in the IRGC-linked neo-radical media ecosystem, alongside the [Fars](/orgs/fars-news-agency) and [Tasnim](/orgs/tasnim-news-agency) news agencies and the [Mashregh](/orgs/mashregh-news) and [Raja](/orgs/raja-news) news websites. It was a strong Ahmadinejad supporter.
